title: Dynamic FOV Offset
description: Allows you have a different FOV in first- and third-person by specifying an offset for each
body:
Baby's first mod. I hate MCreator, and had to forcibly remove the junk class it kept adding in order for this to work. But it works.

I cannot believe that there are like 3 different mods for "better third person" but they all expect you to have a singular FOV setting for both views apparently. Hello? Ever play a third person shooter? They have radically lower FOVs that first person games allow for a reason. This mod should make it far more comfortable to switch between perspectives in gameplay.

[Video preview](https://streamable.com/402xax)

So, aside from me throwing some shade on them, this mod is best used with one of the following:

[Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person)

[Shoulder Surfing Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/shoulder-surfing-reloaded)

[Leawind's Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/leawind-third-person)

and if you use TACZ, one of the companion mods for your choice of the above:

[Third Person Shooting: Zero](https://modrinth.com/mod/third-person-shooting-zero) for Shoulder Surfing

[TaCZ: Leawind's Third Person Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/tacz-leawinds-third-person-compat) for Leawind's
